attacking_style: Not an attacker; finishes reduced bunch sprints and punchy finales rather than initiating moves. Excels when field is whittled down by terrain or circumstances before sprint.
team_tactics: Relies on team positioning work to deliver him into final kilometers (Israel and FDJ setups documented), but lacks pure leadout train dominance. Effective in technical/crosswind scenarios requiring positioning skill over raw power.
terrain_preference: Punchy, reduced sprints and crosswind-affected stages suit him best. Struggles in pure flat-out sprints against top-tier speed specialists where positioning cannot compensate for raw wattage.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing speed in blanket sprints with full peloton; consistently places without winning (multiple 2nd/3rd places). Cannot overpower pure sprinters when positioned equally.
key_patterns: Performs best in reduced sprints after selective racing, not mass gallops (3 observations)
Strong crosswind positioning skills across multiple teams, unusually adaptable (2 observations)
Consistent placings without breakthrough wins at WorldTour level, perennial bridesmaid syndrome (3 observations)
Integrates quickly into new team tactical systems, immediate effectiveness upon transfer (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent top-3 placements in appropriate scenarios (2020-2021) but no progression to wins; ceiling appears reached as quality support rider rather than stage winner
